data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of targeting past customers, but the evidence does not confirm that the system effectively identifies and targets these customers. While the linked use case describes a scenario where discounts are sent to past clients, there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates the system's capability to specifically target these customers based on their past booking behavior. This leads to a gap in fulfilling the requirement as the necessary targeting mechanism is not evidenced.
gaps: No evidence of the system identifying and targeting past customers for booking offers.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
